summary.key_theme: 公司於 Accelerate 2026 大會展示 AI 驅動的資安技術創新與 FortiOS 8.0 升級，獲得市場分析師與機構投資人的正面評價。

bullish.title: Fortinet Reaffirms “Convergence” Strategy at Accelerate 2026, Unveils FortiOS 8.0 and Price Hikes
bullish.reason: 公司透過發布 FortiOS 8.0 與調漲價格，展現強大的定價能力與技術領先地位，有利於長期營收成長。

bullish.title: AI will Act as Tailwind for the Company, According to Fortinet (FTNT)’s Management
bullish.reason: 管理層明確指出 AI 將成為公司成長的順風，強化了市場對其在 AI 資安領域競爭力的信心。

bullish.title: Is Fortinet, Inc. (FTNT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 市場出現看多報告，強調其作為具備持續成長潛力的標的，吸引投資人關注。

bullish.title: FORTINET INC (NASDAQ:FTNT) Presents a Compelling Mix of Strong Fundamentals and Technical Breakout Potential
bullish.reason: 基本面強勁且技術面出現突破訊號，為股價提供上漲動能。

bullish.title: Liquid Networx Wins Two Partner of the Year Awards at Fortinet Accelerate 2026
bullish.reason: 合作夥伴獲獎顯示公司生態系運作良好，有助於產品銷售與市場滲透。

bullish.title: Emerald Growth Equity Strategy Reinitiated Its Position in Fortinet (FTNT) in Q4
bullish.reason: 機構投資人重新建立部位，顯示專業投資機構對公司未來表現持正面看法。

bullish.title: Fortinet (FTNT) Advances While Market Declines: Some Information for Investors
bullish.reason: 股價表現優於大盤，顯示在市場震盪期間具備相對抗跌性。

bullish.title: Fortinet FortiOS 8.0 Targets AI Security And Quantum Ready Growth
bullish.reason: 針對 AI 安全與量子安全進行技術升級，符合資安產業未來發展趨勢。

bearish.title: Here's Why Fortinet (FTNT) Fell More Than Broader Market
bearish.reason: 短期股價表現弱於大盤，主要反映市場對特定交易日的獲利了結賣壓。

neutral.title: Fortinet, Inc. (FTNT) Discusses Cybersecurity Vision, AI-Driven Convergence, and Operating System Innovations at Investor Briefing Transcript
neutral.reason: 提供投資人關於公司願景的詳細資訊，屬於例行性資訊揭露，無直接利多或利空影響。
